## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test additions or updates
- [ ] CI/CD changes
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added type hints for Python functions
- [ ] I have added TypeScript types where needed

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] Coverage meets minimum requirements (80% Python, 75% TypeScript)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added/updated CHANGELOG entry
- [ ] API changes are documented

### Security
- [ ] I have not introduced any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] Input validation is applied where needed
- [ ] Localhost-only restriction maintained

### Accessibility
- [ ] ARIA labels added for new UI elements
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG 2.2 AA standards
- [ ] Screen reader compatible

### Performance
- [ ] No unnecessary re-renders
- [ ] No N+1 query problems
- [ ] Memory leaks addressed
